title: senecio javanicus
intro: Senecio javanicus, also known as Java groundsel, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been known to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Senecio javanicus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and act as an antihistamine to relieve allergic reactions. Senecio javanicus can be prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, and its leaves and stems can also be used in traditional medicine to create various remedies.
